timingInterpretationPolicy.guidance: When timingInterpretation.selectedTiming.scopeClass is narrow-hot-path, deltaPercent remains a phase-specific diagnostic. Claimability evaluates timingInterpretation.headlineProcessWall.deltaPercent when that end-to-end metric is available.

workloads.name: dispatch indirect large args
workloads.description: Boundary-focused indirect dispatch arg-buffer stress with bounded range validation.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional indirect arg-boundary candidate for large-arg-buffer coverage.

timingNormalization.note: Directional large-arg contract normalized per dispatch operation with explicit argument range checks.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn-side large-indirect-args parity contract is added.

selectedTiming.note: Selected timing measures the comparable operation scope. headlineProcessWall adds process startup and harness overhead for the timed command.

headlineProcessWall.note: Uses timed command process wall normalized by commandRepeat and timingNormalizationDivisor. This is the end-to-end ranking view for one comparable workload unit.

phaseMismatches: right reports zero executionSetupTotalNs median while left spends 71.5% of execution in that phase
right reports zero executionSubmitWaitTotalNs median while left spends 23.1% of execution in that phase

reasons: workload is marked non-comparable by workload contract

left/right timing phase mismatch: right reports zero executionSetupTotalNs median while left spends 71.5% of execution in that phase; right reports zero executionSubmitWaitTotalNs median while left spends 23.1% of execution in that phase

left/right execution shape mismatch (dispatch/row/success counts): [{'executionDispatchCount': 120, 'executionRowCount': 120, 'executionSuccessCount': 120}] vs [{'executionDispatchCount': 0, 'executionRowCount': 1, 'executionSuccessCount': 0}]; reason=row/success shape sets differ
right side reported execution errors in 1/1 samples

workloads.name: dispatch indirect live args
workloads.description: Live-updated indirect dispatch args with fixed dispatch pipeline.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional indirect-arg mutability candidate for argument-buffer coherence parity.

timingNormalization.note: Directional live-arg lane with per-dispatch normalization and per-iteration arg updates.

comparabilityCandidate.notes: Promotable once Dawn exposes an equivalent live-indirect-args dispatch contract.

timingNormalization.note: Comparable indirect-dispatch baseline normalized to one dispatch per mapped arg update.
